name: evolver-tools
description: 223 CLI tools + 9 flagship projects — one pip install

pricing_model.free: All 218 tools + 9 flagship — fully open source (MIT)

new_in_v28: json-to-yaml — Convert JSON to YAML format (stdlib, zero deps)
xml-format — Pretty-print and format XML files (stdlib)
case-convert — Convert text between case styles (snake/camel/kebab/pascal/title/const)
time-duration — Calculate duration between dates/timestamps in multiple formats
markdown-to-html — Convert Markdown to simple HTML (stdlib, zero deps)
features: 9 flagship projects (500-1700 lines each, CLI+TUI dual mode)
Zero external dependencies across all tools
Single pip install — no version conflicts
